LEFT moved the left green square back to its original position [30, 18] to [30, 20] - back to original position. So LEFT and RIGHT move the left green square by 3 columns.

sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try pressing RIGHT multiple times to move the left green square to the right room.
# The left green square is at col 18-20, and the right room starts at col 39. So I need to move it right by about 21 columns.
# Each RIGHT moves it by 3 columns, so 7 RIGHTs would move it by 21 columns.
action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
